description: DAG submission outline — parts 1–5 in demo order (base, parallel, critic, coder, new skill).

submission_outline.title: Base queries (session)
submission_outline.summary: Pass hello, A, I, J, K verbatim within the wall-clock bound on each card.

submission_outline.title: Parallel fan-out
submission_outline.summary: Custom query with ≥3 independent sub-tasks as concurrent planner nodes; verify wall-clock ≈ max(branch), not sum.

submission_outline.title: Critic verdict
submission_outline.summary: Tool-grounded pass and fail (validate_json_keys); fail must splice recovery planner with corrected answer.

submission_outline.title: Coder + SandboxExecutor
submission_outline.summary: Coder prompt emits Python for SandboxExecutor; computation the formatter cannot do from text alone.

submission_outline.title: New skill (calculator)
submission_outline.summary: Skill in agent_config.yaml + prompts/calculator.md; orchestrator unchanged.

design_queries.title: Parallel fan-out (≥3 independent sub-tasks)
requirements: Planner emits at least three researcher nodes with no edges between them (one concurrent wave).
Executor runs the wave with asyncio.gather — wall-clock for that layer should be ≈ max(branch elapsed), not the sum.
design_queries.verify: After run: uv run python scripts/dag/analyze_session_timing.py <session_id> — expect parallel_confirmed=true.
design_queries.also_see: Base query I (London / Paris / Berlin) uses the same parallel shape.

design_queries.title: Critic verdict (tool-grounded pass + fail with recovery)
requirements: Property verified by critic tool validate_json_keys (keys author, title, year) — available in cognitive_dag/mcp_server.py.
Run C_pass once: critic passes → formatter only.
Run C_fail once: critic fails → recovery planner node splices in graph → corrected answer with year added.
design_queries.verify: Inspect session graph (Graph tab): C_fail session must show a recovery planner node after critic failure.

queries.label: hello
queries.title: Minimum DAG
queries.notes: Planner emits Formatter as sole successor; wall-clock under 3s.

queries.label: A
queries.title: Shannon Wikipedia
queries.query: Fetch https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Claude_Shannon and tell me his birth date, death date, and three key contributions to information theory.
queries.ui_hint: Live fetch of Claude Shannon Wikipedia; distiller + auto critic before formatter.
queries.notes: Researcher fetch_url; distiller extracts fields; critic auto-spliced; formatter terminal.

queries.label: I
queries.title: Populations parallel fan-out (canonical)
queries.query: Find the populations of London, Paris, Berlin and tell me which two are closest in size.
queries.ui_hint: Canonical parallel shape: 3 researchers in one wave, then coder and formatter.
queries.verify_hint: Same timing check as query P — analyze_session_timing.py on session id.
queries.notes: Three parallel researchers; coder; formatter diamond with auto sandbox_executor.

queries.label: J
queries.title: Graceful failure
queries.query: Read /nonexistent/path.txt and tell me what's in it.
queries.ui_hint: Missing file path — planner should route to formatter with a failure note (no hung tools).
queries.notes: Planner emits formatter directly with failure note; no tool dispatch.

queries.label: K
queries.title: Resumable execution
queries.query: For Lagos, Cairo, and Kinshasa, find current populations and growth rates and tell me which is growing fastest.
queries.ui_hint: Three-city parallel run; kill process mid-wave then: scripts/dag/run_query.py --resume <sid>
queries.verify_hint: Resumed session reuses query.txt; running nodes reset to pending.
queries.notes: Kill mid parallel-researcher layer; resume resets running→pending.

queries.label: P
queries.title: Custom parallel fan-out (three capitals)
queries.query: Find the current population of Tokyo, Mumbai, and São Paulo and tell me which city has the largest population.
queries.ui_hint: Parallel track: three independent population lookups in one concurrent researcher wave.
queries.verify_hint: analyze_session_timing.py → parallel_confirmed=true; layer wall ≈ max(branch), not sum.

queries.label: C_pass
queries.title: Critic pass — JSON keys verified by tool
queries.query: Validate this JSON object exactly as given (do not omit fields): {"author":"Ada Lovelace","title":"Notes","year":1843}. The distiller must output this JSON verbatim. The critic must verify keys author, title, year exist using validate_json_keys.
queries.ui_hint: Run first for critic pass: validate_json_keys sees author, title, year.
queries.verify_hint: Graph: distiller → critic (pass) → formatter; no recovery planner.

queries.label: C_fail
queries.title: Critic fail — missing key triggers recovery
queries.query: Validate this JSON object exactly as given (do not add fields): {"author":"Ada Lovelace","title":"Notes"}. The distiller must output this JSON verbatim. The critic must verify keys author, title, year exist using validate_json_keys. On fail, replan with year added.
queries.ui_hint: Run second for critic fail: missing year → recovery planner splices corrected JSON.
queries.verify_hint: Graph: critic fail → recovery planner node → formatter with year:1843.

queries.label: M
queries.title: Coder + SandboxExecutor computation
queries.query: What is the exact integer value of (17 * 23 - 4) ** 2 + 1000? Use coder to compute; sandbox must verify.
queries.ui_hint: Coder emits Python; sandbox_executor verifies stdout. Expected answer: 150769.

queries.label: CALC
queries.title: Calculator skill
queries.query: What is the exact numeric value of (987654321 ** 0) + ((17 * 23 + 41) / 7)? Use the calculator skill.
queries.ui_hint: Uses calculator skill + safe_calculate tool (yaml + prompt only, no Executor change).
